expectations.text: Presents milestone list for user approval BEFORE writing files
expectations.evidence: CRITICAL: Directly wrote 12 files to knowledge-base/papers/electrode-hardware/ AND modified INDEX.md without asking for user approval. This violates the workflow.

expectations.text: Searched for authoritative review papers as the source
expectations.evidence: Worked from general knowledge without web search. Self-acknowledged: 'I worked from general knowledge without web search verification, so some author lists and DOIs may have inaccuracies'

expectations.text: Paper summaries follow the skill template (yaml frontmatter + 4 sections)
expectations.evidence: Files follow the format of existing entries (yaml frontmatter + 4 Chinese sections). Agent copied the pattern from existing speech-decoding and motor-bci entries.

expectations.text: Asks user follow-up questions about edge cases or cross-references
expectations.evidence: No follow-up questions. Presented the result as completed work, not as a proposal for review.
